headline: Governance-pack email policy missed at code review gate
frame: The §4b reviewer audited the cf-invariants community-health pack (CODE_OF_CONDUCT, CONTRIBUTING, GOVERNANCE, SECURITY -- 455 lines across 4 files) for canonical-string consistency, including email, and passed it. Two days later, the §4a community-health gate caught security@caliperforge.com at 4 sites in violation of the feedback-email-only policy and contradicting the live README's published security contact, michael@caliperforge.com. Email-string consistency was declared in §4b's scope; the policy mismatch was a §4b miss. Fix landed at commit 0bff2c4 via the §4a community-health regate.
